description: Offline-first mobile business management app for rice distribution. Features inventory tracking, invoice generation, customer management, and sales analytics with full offline capability using Drift ORM and Riverpod state management.
AI-powered code grading platform using multi-agent architecture. Automated evaluation of code submissions with intelligent feedback generation via Gemini API and LangChain agent loops.

Competitive strategy game implementing advanced algorithm optimizations including Minimax with Alpha-Beta pruning, Zobrist hashing for state deduplication, and iterative deepening for move computation.
Real-time event management and crowd intelligence platform. Features live attendee tracking, event analytics dashboards, and smart crowd flow optimization.
Personal finance retirement planning tool with compound interest projections, inflation adjustment, and investment portfolio simulation.
Enterprise-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline using Pathway AI framework. Features real-time document ingestion, semantic chunking, vector search, and LLM-powered response generation.
Full-featured e-commerce platform with product catalog, cart management, user authentication, and order tracking. Built during CodSoft internship.
Collaborative project management tool with task tracking, milestone management, team collaboration, and analytics dashboards. Built during CodSoft internship.
Automated GST invoice generation and tax calculation workflows for small business operations. Built using n8n workflow automation for the family rice distribution business.
AI-powered dispute resolution and de-escalation tool. Uses NLP to analyze conflict patterns and suggest resolution strategies.
Structured personal knowledge base optimized for RAG retrieval. Contains biographical, professional, project, and psychological profile data in CSV, JSON, YAML, and Markdown formats.
Personal developer portfolio website showcasing projects, experience, and technical writing. Cyberpunk aesthetic with fast, functional design.
Bridge module connecting RiceAgent Pro mobile app with n8n GST automation workflows. Enables seamless data flow between field operations and tax compliance.
Collection of hackathon project codebases from Synaptix (IIT Madras), Gemini 3, HDFC FinCal, Meta PyTorch, and IIT Kharagpur Data Hack competitions.
Data structures and algorithms practice repository with solutions in Java and Python. Covers arrays, trees, graphs, dynamic programming, and competitive programming patterns.
